Review: crate-html scaffold

3 findings across the freshly scaffolded daemon.

MED · Path-traversal defense relies on path.Clean
internal/server/server.go:139

The current logic siteDir + path.Clean("/" + rest) works, but a future refactor that splits the cleaning step from the join would silently break. Wrap it in a helper that returns an error if the cleaned path escapes the site root.

LOW · tar.TypeRegA is deprecated
internal/storage/storage.go:175

Already nolint'd, but worth dropping in a follow-up — Go 1.26 still defines it but it has been unused by archive/tar's own writer since Go 1.11.

LOW · No CLI flag for config path override
cmd/crate/main.go, cmd/crated/main.go

Useful for testing and for running multiple instances. Single --config flag would cover it.
